summary: Full backend + frontend testing for EDN Renovation Group landing page. All 6 backend pytest cases pass (POST/GET /api/enquiries incl. validation & sorting). Frontend e2e via Playwright: cinematic loader resolves, hero heading 'Luxury Renovations Crafted To Perfection' renders, navigation scrolls to sections, 'Get Free Quote' CTA scrolls to contact form, empty-form submit shows error toast, valid submit shows success toast and clears form, new enquiry appears on /admin page (data-testid admin-list/admin-item), before-after slider present, gallery shows 8 images with 0 broken, all sections render.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin page is publicly accessible at /admin with PII (names, emails, phones). For production: add basic auth or admin token gate.
EnquiryCreate has no max-length constraints; consider Field(..., max_length=N) on name/email/phone/message to prevent oversized payloads.
Backend stores timestamps as ISO strings but Pydantic models declare datetime — relying on fromisoformat in GET. Storing as native datetime via Mongo BSON Date would be cleaner.
No rate-limiting on POST /api/enquiries — easy spam vector for a public form.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_*-prefixed enquiries via API and one PWUser_* enquiry via the UI for verification. They remain in the DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_enquiries.py covers create (valid/minimal), invalid email (422), missing required (422), GET sort newest-first, and persistence. Frontend Playwright flow confirmed: loader -> hero -> nav scroll -> empty submit error toast -> valid submit success toast -> form clear -> /admin list shows new entry. All testids: hero-heading, nav-<id>, nav-cta-quote, enquiry-form, field-name/email/phone/message, enquiry-submit, before-after-slider, admin-list/admin-item/admin-empty.
